articles.author: Hilary George
articles.title: Meghan Markle pairs $26K Cartier watch with Dior to feed the homeless in Australia - Page Six
articles.description: Markle wore jewelry worth nearly $35,000 to a woman’s homeless shelter on the first day of her Australia tour.
articles.content:
Meghan Markle was dripping in $35K worth of high-end jewelry as she fed the homeless in Melbourne, Australia.
The Duchess of Sussex, 44, rocked a $26,200 Cartier Tank Française watch, a $7,950 yello… [+2914 chars]
